title: Most of Quilt
description: Small kitchen sink pack for those looking for something not too difficult, but still enjoyable!
body:
# Modlist Here are just some of the major mods included in this pack! And a few lesser known ones I've come to like.
Major Mods Applied Energistics 2 A storage sorting, and crafting automation mod.
Botania Magic, be one with nature, or destroy it, made by Vaskii.
Create for all your vanilla-esque automation needs!
Ad Astra! reach for the stars! find your place!
Tech Reborn the classic technical mod!
Lesser Known Mods Incendium New and improved nether! Found this a while ago, and it's awesome.
Nullscape New and improved end! Made by the same dev, just as awesome, and looks amazing with shaders.
Alloy Forgery Alloy metals together!
# Minimum Requirements From my experience in the past week or so of playing this pack, ~6gb as a minimum is required, I have tried less and it does not launch, as the modlist is simply too big. It is fairly stable, though, and the only crashes noticed were during the creation and once it was running there we no issues I could tell, however let me know if you encounter any bugs while playing! JVM Args ```-XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:+UseCompressedOops -XX:-UsePerfData -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200 -XX:ParallelGCThreads=8 -XX:ConcGCThreads=2 -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent=50 -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=1 -XX:G1HeapWastePercent=5 -XX:G1MixedGCCountTarget=8``` # Curseforge Mods / Attribution [Xaero's World Map](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map)
[Xaero's Minimap](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap)
[Quarry Reborn](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quarry-reborn) # (Also thank you so much to the lovely mods <3)
